reason: Three independent minimal Workbooks.Add attempts created Excel and then received Excel SCODE 0x800A03EC before any workbook, sheet, layout, export, protection, or macro operation could run. Each transient process exited naturally; no process was terminated.

The baseline was captured before AutomationSecurityGuard existed. The user directed that the recurring host issue not be investigated further, so no fourth controlled Excel launch was made solely to enrich the baseline snapshot.
